subcodes.first_line: That honored one should, with wisdom and utterance, according to his capacity, give unto the peoples of the contingent world the glad-tidings of the appearance of Him Who spoke on Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنجناب باید بحکمت و بیان اهل امکان را علی قدر مقدور بظهور مکلم طور بشارت دهند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power of prayer, @unity in diversity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation
